The core subject matter of the website https://wap.xushuishiwu.cn is related to MetaMask, a universal cryptocurrency wallet also known as 小狐狸钱包 (which translates to "Little Fox Wallet"). ### List of Prompts

- Prompt 9: Explain how to import tokens into MetaMask and provide a list of supported tokens.

These prompts are designed to leverage the specific content of the webpage, focusing on MetaMask and its applications, to guide the LLM in generating relevant and useful responses.
